title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision capabilities, without maps or game-state helpers. Earlier Claude models required a complex helper harness for the same task.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and its vision capabilities, with no maps or game-state helpers. The significance is the contrast with earlier Claude models, which needed a complex helper harness to accomplish the same task. The takeaway is that improved vision and agent behavior let the model perceive and act on the game directly, removing the scaffolding that prior versions depended on.
